以我所知
CS EE MA department 分別應左機

如果未應機 可能
1 收唔到
2 收到 見唔到 （你個email title太7）
3 send 錯email (錯左 就send 比course leader)
4 避緊難 仲未返工
5 未決定好
6 已reject左 （reject左 不會通知，等到20 號上aims 睇）
7 想一次過一批決定

最好同一科 有大量朋友send pass fail form ,比professor ，令佢了一有點壓力 ，可能會易approval !
因為如果得你一個send 證明 得你有問題 ，所以理得你！
如果有大量人send ， 證明真是存在不公平 ，就可能易approval

收唔到朋友 ，只好等待 ，直到20號 上aims or等收email

以上是純粹亂up ，有任何風險問題 ，請自行承擔結果！

Dear Students and Colleagues:

Given the unprecedented escalation of unrest and the damage it has caused to our campus, CityU will proceed with the following special arrangements for the remainder of the Semester A.

1.November 15, 2019 will be the last day of the teaching period. There will be no further classes, including face-to-face or online teaching (i.e., no further video lectures on Canvas) during Semester A 2019/20.
2.The remainder of the semester will be reserved for assignment completion and the assessment period.
3.Teaching staff will, as much as possible, maintain the continuous assessment (assignment) arrangements. For assignments that previously required in-class presentations or similar activities, alternate completion mechanisms will be announced by course teachers.
4.There will be no final examinations. Course leaders may either waive the final examination and base the course grade on continuous assessment alone, or may arrange for an additional assessment task in lieu of the final examination. Course leaders will inform students of the arrangements as soon as possible. Assessments will only cover content from the teaching period spanning September 2 to November 15, 2019.
5.Course leaders are encouraged to upload additional, supplementary teaching materials and to provide online advice as feasible.
6.Students will receive full credit for courses taken this semester, if they successfully complete the assessment tasks.
7.Semester transcripts will be issued to students as per regular procedure.

University Announcement: Exceptional Arrangements for the Remainder of the Semester A (11/14/2019 2:51PM)
